summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuddyBot Chrome Extension integration features. All new browsing data endpoints, parent dashboard browsing activity tab, and enhanced AI chat with browsing context working correctly.
passed_tests: All 8 new extension backend endpoints working (packets, status, stats, searches, visits, analysis)
Extension packet submission creates browsing alerts for flagged searches
Extension device status tracking with packet and alert counts
Browsing statistics endpoint returns correct counts (packets, searches, visits, incognito, flagged)
Browsing searches endpoint returns search queries with profanity/topic flags
Browsing visits endpoint returns URL visit data
AI browsing pattern analysis endpoint working with CAUTION safety level for flagged content
Enhanced chat with browsing context - AI responses include browsing history analysis
Parent Dashboard overview shows new browsing stats cards (Browsing Packets: 7, Browsing Alerts: 2, Incognito Activity: 2)
Parent Dashboard Browsing Activity tab fully functional with stats, searches, visits sections
Run AI Analysis button works and displays safety analysis results
Browsing alerts show 'Browser' and 'Incognito' badges correctly in alerts tab
Recent searches display with Incognito badges and flagged status indicators
Recent visits display with domain and timestamp information
Chat functionality still works with message sending and AI responses
Navigation between chat and parent dashboard working correctly
Extension files verified present: manifest.json, background.js, content.js, popup files, options files

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 8 new extension endpoints working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All browsing activity features working, proper badge display, AI analysis functional
